_README: This is an EXAMPLE settings file. Copy it to .claude/settings.json (not
committed) and add your own permissions list. The critical section
below — the KPI rule guard hook — should be kept EXACTLY as-is on every
team agent so we all enforce the same lead/SQL source-of-truth rule.

hooks.statusMessage: Reviewing git, Railway and health status...

PreToolUse._comment: Pre-send review for outbound surfaces — checks Slack format / Asana footer / naming convention
CRITICAL — blocks analysis scripts that query campaigns_daily.leads as a leads metric. See memory/CRITICAL_KPI_RULES.md.

permissions._README: Add your own permissions here — each team agent will have a different list
